name: Create Color Wheel & Art Elements Flipchart
description: Create a 3-page Art Lesson flipchart in ActivInspire to serve as a structured visual aid for a color theory lesson. The first page must include the title "Color Theory", the subtitle "Elements of Art", and at least one decorative shape. The second page must feature a color wheel diagram with at least 6 distinct shapes (Red, Yellow, Blue, Orange, Green, and Violet/Purple) that are labeled and filled with their respective colors. The third page must be titled "Elements of Art" and contain a text list of the seven elements: Line, Shape, Form, Space, Color, Value, and Texture. Save the completed flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/color_wheel_art.flipchart.
